greeting: ^Ah, Barrington. I see ye've escaped the yellin' too.

^Aye, I know ye didn't mean to break me ship. Ye was just try'na help. Don't let anyone tell ye'r any different. Besides, a good pirate is never truly beaten without a ship! We'll just have to build ye a new one.
^Here lad, I found this. I know ye've always been a listenin' ear to us. Maybe it be time to see where ye can go on yer own?
